title: [spec-compliance] dio_int_min=3 instead of 12 in RPL DODAG config
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/messages.c:257 sets cfg->dio_int_min = 3 (encoding Imin=8ms). But spec/05-routing.md:129, appendix-rpl.md, constants.toml, Kconfig default and trickle.c use Imin=4096ms=2^12. Per RFC 6550 §6.7.6 dio_int_min is the exponent. On-wire DIOs will mismatch runtime Trickle params, violating MUST/SHOULD for consistent config. See explore task ses_073931f7fffe3CmC6eVVkumFWa for full analysis. Fixes needed in lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init() and tests.
